name: Cortland County Gymnasium
description: Cortland County Gymnasium is a place to play pickleball in Cortland, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Cortland County Office Building
description: Cortland County Office Building is a place to play pickleball in Cortland, NY. There are 3 wood courts. 1 is outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Grace Christian Fellowship
description: Grace Christian Fellowship is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cortland, NY. There are 3 indoor clay courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: J.M. McDonald Sports Complex
description: J.M. McDonald Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Cortland, NY. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Randall School Tennis Courts
description: Randall School Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Cortland, NY. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: YWCA of Cortland
description: Come play pickleball at YWCA of Cortland in Cortland, NY! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water.
